overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character walking along a scenic canyon cliff edge overlooking a waterfall and river, then traversing a dry grassland trail with scattered oak trees. The character encounters a horse rider passing by before entering a shaded woodland path.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon cliff edge overlooking waterfall and river

events.description: waterfall moves out of view as character progresses along cliff edge

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the narrow rocky cliff edge overlooking the river canyon below

entered.detail: large waterfall cascading down the canyon wall into the river below
steep rocky canyon wall rising on the left side
steep rocky canyon wall on the right with sparse vegetation
wide river flowing through the canyon bottom with blue water
narrow dirt and rock path along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dramatic canyon overlook with a waterfall cascading into a river far below. The character walks steadily along the narrow cliff edge path as the waterfall gradually exits the frame, revealing expansive views of the canyon walls and distant mountains under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside path with scattered oak trees

events.description: horse rider passes by traveling in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliffside path as the landscape transitions from open canyon to tree-dotted terrain

notable_agents.action: riding a horse along the path in the opposite direction, passing by the ego character

entered.detail: cluster of green oak trees lining the right side of the path
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon across the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the cliffside as scattered oak trees begin appearing on the right. The canyon wall and river shift to the left side of the frame while remaining visible. At approximately 28 seconds, a horse rider emerges from the right and passes by traveling in the opposite direction, creating the only crowd interaction in this segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded woodland trail through dry grassland

events.description: entering dense tree cover causes transition from direct sunlight to dappled shade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding dirt path through the shaded oak woodland

entered.detail: dense overhead canopy of oak leaves creating dappled shade on the path
golden brown dry grass covering the hillside between trees
large boulders and rock outcrops scattered among the trees

segments.scene_description: The character enters a densely wooded area where the cliff and river disappear from view. The lighting shifts dramatically from bright direct sun to dappled shade as an oak tree canopy covers the path. The trail winds through dry golden grass and scattered rock formations, with large tree trunks now flanking both sides of the route.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, open canyon overlook into the dappled shade of a dense woodland. It begins with the character walking along a narrow cliff edge beside a cascading waterfall, which gradually exits the frame to reveal expansive views of distant mountains under a midday sun. As the path continues, the canyon walls shift to the left and scattered oak trees appear on the right, just as a lone horse rider emerges to pass the character in the opposite direction. The scene then shifts as the character enters a wooded area, causing the cliff and river to disappear from view while the lighting transforms from direct sunlight to soft, dappled shade. Finally, the trail winds through dry golden grass and rock formations, flanked by large tree trunks under a thick canopy of oaks.
